problem.summary: Compare a generic runtime kernel path against a shape-specialized hipRTC/hipRTC cache/link path cache design. Source files are concise notes-style C++ scaffolds and do not claim measured compile or run times.
inputs: kernel key: dtype, shape, architecture, flags
outputs: output produced by a cached specialized kernel when available
constraints: Cache key must include architecture and compilation options
Measure compile latency separately from steady-state launch latency
Keep generic fallback for cache miss or compile failure

verification.method: Run the generic and specialized kernels on identical inputs and compare outputs.

curation.notes: This is a planning scaffold for hipRTC/hipRTC cache/link path specialization. Future records must separate JIT overhead from cached execution.
